title: Rayleigh Watches the Crew Leave
description: On pages 1–4, this part follows Unknown person #1, Rayleigh, Brook, Narrator, Franky, Luffy, Nami. The core story beat is rayleigh watches the crew leave.
scene: The scene centers on rayleigh watches the crew leave, with Unknown person #1, Rayleigh, Brook, Narrator, Franky, Luffy, Nami driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...that you do not cross this line.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Crap... they're one step ahead of us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I just knew this mayhem had something to do with you people!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are you still hanging around here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I want to become a tick...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, what are you doing still hanging around here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is that any way to talk to the person who brought you all the way here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why, if it weren't for me, you'd be...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A real woman... a real woman...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, of course I am!! What are you, sick in the head?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: At any rate, you need to set sail as soon as possible!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There are battleships appearing just off- shore!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Gotta say, I'm impressed you gave up your life of stardom. Good on you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ah, such memories these faces bring BAA AAAAAACK!:) Yeah!!

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: Well then, nami-san... for the first time in two years...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Would you be so kind... as to show me your pan-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I never showed you them in the first place!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A... Ahhhh... my heart is... all a- flutter... at this touching... Reunion......!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: urhhhh!! Not... that I have a heart... to flutter, of course!! Yohoho - yoho - urghhh...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Uh, we've got a superstar in convulsions on the floor...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Honestly... Don't you people ever grow up...?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...it would appear... that we are not yet all assembled...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We've sent chopper out to fetch the others -

summary: Rayleigh Watches the Crew Leave. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
